description: Derived-of-derived chain / lazy pull (§6.6). const <quad> = @doubled * 2 reads another derived. One grow (@base 2->3) pulls doubled=6 then quad=12. Tests transitive lazy-pull through a derived chain.
rationale: §6.6 derived cells: a derived that reads another derived recomputes transitively on dirty upstream — quad reads 12 (via the freshly-pulled doubled=6), not a stale 8.
